caption: A person is mixing a large batch of popcorn in a light-colored bowl. A woman with short blonde hair wearing a dark long-sleeved shirt appears in a circular inset in the lower left of the scene. The text "UCAR CENTER FOR SCIENCE EDUCATION" is displayed in the upper left corner of the images, accompanied by a logo. Throughout the sequence, a hand is seen stirring and tossing the popcorn, which is mixed with green and blue-colored pieces. The hand moves across the bowl from left to right and then back, shifting the popcorn as it stirs. The background behind the woman in the inset shows a glimpse of a room with a blue curtain. The focus remains on the action of mixing the popcorn within the bowl while the woman watches from the inset.
